zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Richardson於1651年1月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，他的父親Thomas Richardson V42歲，母親Mary39歲。他於大約1672年與Mary Peacock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1714年12月4日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathaniel Richardson于1651年1月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，他的父亲Thomas Richardson V42岁，母亲Mary39岁。他于大约1672年与Mary Peacock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1714年12月4日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Richardson was born on 2 January 1651, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Richardson V, was 42 and his mother, Mary, was 39. He married Mary Peacock about 1672, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 4 December 1714, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathaniel Richardson est né le 2 janvier 1651, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Richardson V, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Mary Peacock environ 1672, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1714, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nathaniel Richardson am 2. Januar 1651 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richardson V 42 und seine Mutter Mary 39. Er hat um 1672 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Peacock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1714 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Richardson è nato il il 2 gennaio 1651 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Richardson V, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Mary Peacock circa 1672, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Richardsonが1651年1月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Thomas Richardson Vは42歳，母Maryは39歳であった。約1672年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでMary Peacockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1714年12月4日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Richardson(이)가 1651년 1월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richardson V(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1672년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Mary Peacock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1714년 12월 4일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Richardson nasceu em 2 de janeiro de 1651, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Richardson V, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Peacock aproximadamente 1672, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1714, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Richardson родился 2 января 1651 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson V было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Peacock около 1672 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 4 декабря 1714 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathaniel Richardson nació el 2 de enero de 1651, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Richardson V, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Mary Peacock aproximadamente 1672, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1714, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
